name: PER_POSITION_BUDGETS
description: Position Budgets table that stores allocated values for headcount, FTE & amount.

columns.Name: POSITION_BUDGET_ID
columns.Comments: Unique identifier of the position budget.

columns.Name: BUDGET_PERIOD_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Start date of the budgetary period for which the position budget is being entered.

columns.Name: BUDGET_PERIOD_END_DATE
columns.Comments: End date of the budgetary period for which the position budget is being entered.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_UNIT_ID
columns.Comments: Unique identifier of the business unit for which the position budget is being entered.

columns.Name: DEPARTMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Unique identifier of the department for which the position budget is being entered.

columns.Name: LOCATION_ID
columns.Comments: Unique identifier of the location for which the position budget is being entered.

columns.Name: ALLOCATED_HEADCOUNT
columns.Comments: Headcount allocated for the budgetary period. Sum of headcount of all applicable positions should not exceed this value.

columns.Name: ALLOCATED_FTE
columns.Comments: FTE allocated for the budgetary period. Sum of FTE of all applicable positions should not exceed this value.

columns.Name: ALLOCATED_AMOUNT
columns.Comments: Amount allocated for the budgetary period. Sum of amount of all applicable positions should not exceed this value.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
